name: Par Fore Golf Company
about: Par Fore Golf Company is an indoor golf simulator venue located in downtown Newnan, Georgia. The facility features three state-of-the-art simulator bays equipped with Bushnell technology, offering a comfortable atmosphere for players to improve their game or socialize. They provide flexible memberships starting at $150 per month, along with hourly rates for non-members, and emphasize a relaxed, convenient environment with access to drinks and snacks.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Bushnell simulator technology with accurate ball tracking and high-definition course visuals
Flexible pricing options including monthly memberships and affordable hourly rates
Convenient downtown Newnan location with a comfortable lounge area and food and drink amenities

food_and_drink.notes: Snacks available; currently allows bringing your own food until final licensing is obtained
Currently only soda and water are served; planning to add beer and wine with a Masters-style menu

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced ball tracking and high-definition graphics for accurate shot analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if clubs are provided. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Currently, you can bring your own food and drink until the venue's licensing is finalized. They currently offer soda, water, and snacks.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing for 18 holes. Typically, simulator play takes 2-3 hours depending on the number of players and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Par Fore Golf Company is kid-friendly, making it suitable for families with children.
